title: taraxacum volitans
intro: Taraxacum volitans, also known as the wandering dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum volitans include its ability to treat various digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum volitans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
